# Wraps

> Deploy production-ready email infrastructure to your AWS account in 30 seconds.

Wraps is a developer tool that deploys email sending infrastructure (AWS SES) directly to users' AWS accounts. No credentials stored, transparent AWS pricing ($0.10 per 1,000 emails), full data ownership.

## What Wraps Does

Wraps provides two products:

1. **CLI (`@wraps.dev/cli`)** - One command deploys complete email infrastructure:
   - AWS SES configuration with DKIM signing
   - Event tracking (opens, clicks, bounces, complaints)
   - Email history storage in DynamoDB
   - OIDC integration for Vercel (zero stored credentials)
   - IAM roles with least-privilege permissions

2. **Platform (app.wraps.dev)** - Visual dashboard for email operations:
   - Template editor with drag-and-drop blocks
   - Broadcast campaigns with segmentation
   - Workflow automation builder
   - Contact management with topics/preferences
   - Real-time analytics and deliverability metrics

## TypeScript SDK

```typescript
import { Wraps } from '@wraps.dev/email';

const wraps = new Wraps();

await wraps.emails.send({
  from: 'hello@yourapp.com',
  to: 'user@example.com',
  subject: 'Welcome!',
  html: '<h1>Hello from Wraps!</h1>',
});
```

## Key Differentiators

- **Your AWS Account**: Infrastructure deploys to your account, not ours
- **No Vendor Lock-in**: You own everything, data stays if you leave
- **Transparent Pricing**: Pay AWS directly, no markup
- **30-Second Setup**: `npx @wraps.dev/cli email init` and done
- **Type-Safe**: Full TypeScript support with inference

## Installation

```bash
# Deploy infrastructure
npx @wraps.dev/cli email init

# Install SDK
npm install @wraps.dev/email
```

## Links

- Website: https://wraps.dev
- Documentation: https://wraps.dev/docs
- Quickstart: https://wraps.dev/docs/quickstart/email
- SDK Reference: https://wraps.dev/docs/sdk-reference
- CLI Reference: https://wraps.dev/docs/cli-reference
- GitHub (SDK): https://github.com/wraps-team/wraps-js
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wraps.dev/email

## Use Cases

- Transactional emails (welcome, password reset, receipts)
- Marketing broadcasts with segmentation
- Automated email workflows (drip campaigns, onboarding)
- Developer applications needing email with full AWS control

## Technical Stack

- Infrastructure: Pulumi deploying to AWS (SES, DynamoDB, Lambda, EventBridge, SQS)
- SDK: TypeScript, works with any Node.js framework
- Platform: React 19, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui
- Auth: OIDC (Vercel), IAM roles (AWS native)

## Contact

- Support: support@wraps.dev
- Twitter: @wraboratory
